title: Harden atomic issue checkout under concurrent agent wakeups
description: Reproduce two agents waking on the same issue, verify only one checkout wins, and add the missing service assertion.

title: Define what counts as a completed agent-work loop
description: Write the operator-facing definition: issue assigned, run executed, artifact or decision produced, review complete, and issue closed.

title: Make failed run retry preserve issue context
description: Retry should carry the original issue, project, billing code, transcript pointer, and failure reason into the next run.

title: Add dashboard treatment for weekly completed work loops
description: Show weekly completed loops with supporting counts for active runs, blocked work, and pending approvals without turning the dashboard into a vanity metric page.

title: Make Calendar derive agent work blocks from heartbeat runs
description: Calendar should show work history from run records and issues. Do not manufacture Calendar-only scenarios to make the page look dense.

title: Verify dense overlapping agent runs remain readable in week view
description: Use real parallel run clusters from Octopus Studio to verify overlapping work blocks, not synthetic Calendar QA labels.

title: Layer operator checkpoints over agent run history
description: Add a small set of human review meetings so Calendar shows the difference between planned operator time and actual agent execution time.

title: Run packaged desktop smoke after profile routing changes
description: Verify packaged boot, local profile isolation, startup migrations, and UI reachability after the latest dev shell changes.

title: Check npx @octopus/cli@latest local startup path
description: Validate that npm latest starts a local trusted instance with embedded Postgres and serves the UI on the expected port.

runProfile.failure: latest dist-tag still points to stale desktop asset metadata

title: Approve release note language for agent control-plane positioning
description: Make the release note explain work loops, governance, and local-first operation without sounding like a generic task board.

title: Promote Octopus Studio into mock-data-maintainer reusable fixture
description: Store the canonical Octopus Studio facts as JSON plus a seed script so future demo and user-scenario work starts from the same month-long org.

title: Teach Skill Optimizer to catch component-vs-scenario drift
description: Capture the correction that Calendar should be a downstream signal of real org work, not a separately fabricated component fixture.

title: Refresh adapter creation docs around runtime config and secrets
description: Document how new adapters should separate persisted config, runtime-only secrets, and workspace execution policy.

title: Publish X launch thread: Octopus as the operating layer for agent teams
description: Ship a concrete thread with problem, demo GIF, why task boards fail for agents, and a narrow CTA for builders running coding agents daily.

title: Write build-in-public post about one month of Octopus agents running daily
description: Use actual Octopus Studio signals: issue counts, run clusters, budget overage, blocked release work, and growth follow-up to make the post concrete.

title: Prepare Hacker News launch packet with repo, demo, and founder comment
description: Draft title variants, first comment, technical objections, and a checklist for the launch window. Do not submit until demo flow is stable.

description: Explain the management problem using a small team example: agents can code, but the team needs ownership, approvals, cost, and work history.

description: Ask whether they have daily coding-agent work that needs assignment, review, budget tracking, and run history. Track replies by objection.

title: Classify founder DM replies into demand, objection, and follow-up buckets
description: Turn replies into concrete product and messaging issues instead of letting them disappear in chat.

title: Turn growth objections into product issues
description: Map objections like 'Linear already does this', 'agents do not need managers', and 'cost tracking is enough' into product proof points.

title: Add lightweight waitlist capture for qualified builders
description: Collect name, repo/tool context, weekly agent runs, and biggest control-plane pain. Avoid a generic newsletter signup.

title: Publish weekly growth report from Octopus Studio data
description: Report posts shipped, replies, qualified conversations, top objections, demo bottlenecks, and follow-up issues created.

description: Create an approval requiring at least 10 qualified conversations, stable demo flow, and clear onboarding CTA before Product Hunt scheduling.

title: Make approval threads preserve linked issue context

title: Convert operator chat into issue with approval gate

title: Route monthly budget overage into Messenger alert
description: When Octopus Studio exceeds the monthly budget, the operator should see a clear Messenger alert with cost by project and resume options.

title: Make dashboard surface real operational tension
